pi_items.source: Code analysis: setup_task.sh creates initial 6-slide presentation; task inserts 1 agenda slide to position 1, resulting in 7 total slides
Code analysis: Verifier expects agenda slide at index 1 (Slide 2), confirmed in verifier.py line 90 and task description ('positioned as the second slide')
Code analysis: setup_task.sh lines 46-59 create slides with these exact titles in this exact order. These become Slides 3-7 after agenda insertion.
Code analysis: setup_task.sh line 61 saves presentation to this path; export_result.sh line 9 and verifier.py line 46 reference the same path

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a synthetic ODP presentation created programmatically with 6 initial slides. The initial slides (after Title slide) contain exactly the 5 expected topics in the correct order: Cloud Migration Timeline, Budget Variance Analysis, Talent Acquisition Pipeline, Security Audit Findings, and Vendor Renewal Status. The task requires inserting an agenda slide at index 1 (Slide 2), which will increase the total slide count to 7. The presentation file is located at /home/ga/Documents/Presentations/strategic_initiatives.odp.
